{{CargoOrgan
|name=Murderous Bones
|type=Bionic
|rank=blue
|id=10654
|idx=11
|description=A skeletal armor oozing dread. Listen closely… are those wails of trapped souls or just tinnitus?
|skill=Summon a Bone Thorn Armor, dealing DMG
equal to 154% of ATK!
|hp=1466
|def=109
|atk=76
|rush=86
|gene1=During exploration, Fire DMG +60
|gene2=In explorations, {race} HP +200
|gene3=In explorations, DMG REDUC +2%
|gene7=Fire DMG +90 (Awakened)
|}}
